name: reviewcourt
tagline: Post-meeting requirement verdict from Tencent Meeting transcripts / 需求评审庭：会后原话裁决 + 会议与 PRD 双源核对
description: Evidence-backed post-meeting requirement review skill powered by the official Tencent Meeting tmeet CLI. Locates ended review meetings, builds an evidence chain from smart minutes and paragraph transcripts, and outputs a Pass / Conditional Pass / Reject / Insufficient Info verdict with blockers, acceptance criteria drafts, and quote-level citations. Supports dual-source checking against a PRD for omissions and conflicts. Not for general minutes, live listening, auto-outbound actions, PRD rewriting, or people performance evaluation. 基于腾讯会议官方 tmeet CLI 的会后需求评审裁决 Skill：从智能纪要与逐段转写建立证据链，给出通过/有条件通过/驳回/信息不足，并支持会议与 PRD 双源核对。
author: Chris1Wang3
